## Validation

- [ ] cargo fmt --all
- [ ] cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
- [ ] cargo test --all-targets
- [ ] ./scripts/qa-gate.sh
- [ ] packaging/install checks when relevant
- [ ] docs/help text updated when feature surface changed
- [ ] GitHub-facing docs links still valid (README, START_HERE, release notes)
